storyHook: 迷路求助，对方指路，找到目的地

narrative.when: 下午三点，约在陌生街区见面
narrative.who: 甲（路人/游客）· 乙（本地居民）
narrative.how: 礼貌停下问路，对方用手指方向
narrative.method: 说明目的地、听指路、重复确认、道谢离开
narrative.event: 甲手机没电，找不到约好的咖啡馆

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am turned round, sir.
turns.zh: 先生，我转向了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, no trouble. Where are you going?
turns.zh: 哦，没事。你要去哪儿？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am looking for a place named 'Afternoon' that has drink.
turns.zh: 我在找一家叫‘午后’的店，有饮料的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I see. Your phone is dead?
turns.zh: 好的，我知道了。你手机没电了？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it went dark. I am new to this town.
turns.zh: 对，没电了。我刚来这个镇子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Go two streets that way.
turns.zh: 没问题。往那边走两个路口。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Two streets? And then what do I do?
turns.zh: 两个路口？然后呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Turn right at the bakery. Then go about a hundred steps.
turns.zh: 在面包店右转，再走大约一百步。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A hundred steps. And the sign is green, is that right?
turns.zh: 一百步。招牌是绿色的，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That's it. Green sign on the left side. You will see it.
turns.zh: 没错。左边绿色招牌。你会看到的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will go that way now.
turns.zh: 好的，我现在就走那边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Best of hope. It is not far.
turns.zh: 祝你好运。不远。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 谢谢你的帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 不客气。祝你愉快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. okay.
turns.zh: 你也是。好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are kind. I will go now.
turns.zh: 您真是太好了。我现在就走。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take the second street on your right.
turns.zh: 在你右边第二条街拐弯。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Second right. Got it.
turns.zh: 右边第二条。记住了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then walk straight for a bit.
turns.zh: 然后直走一小段。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How far is a bit?
turns.zh: 一小段是多远？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: About three minutes, no more.
turns.zh: 大概三分钟，不会更多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Three minutes. That is short.
turns.zh: 三分钟。那很近。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. The place is on the left.
turns.zh: 是的。那地方在左边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Left side. With a green sign.
turns.zh: 左边。有个绿色招牌。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is right. You will not miss it.
turns.zh: 没错。你不会错过的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So I go two roads, then right.
turns.zh: 所以走两个路口，然后右转。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. At the bakery.
turns.zh: 对。在面包店那里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then walk for three minutes.
turns.zh: 然后走三分钟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: About that. Not more.
turns.zh: 差不多。不会多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And the place is on the left.
turns.zh: 地方在左边。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: With a green sign. You will see it.
turns.zh: 有个绿色招牌。你会看到的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What if I go past it?
turns.zh: 要是走过了怎么办？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then you see a place for disease. Too far.
turns.zh: 那你会看到药店。就走过了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will keep an eye out.
turns.zh: 好的。我会留意的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You will be all right. sure.
turns.zh: 你会没事的。好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Two roads across, then turn right at the bakery.
turns.zh: 对。两个路口，然后在面包店右转。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. And then a hundred steps, more or less.
turns.zh: 是的。然后走一百步左右。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Left side, green sign. That is clear.
turns.zh: 左边，绿色招牌。清楚了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have it. No need to be troubled.
turns.zh: 你记住了。不用着急。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I will go now.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我现在就走。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will walk on now. Two roads, then right.
turns.zh: 我现在就走。两个路口，然后右转。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. Keep your eyes open for the bakery.
turns.zh: 没错。留意面包店。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And after that, a hundred steps. Left side, green sign.
turns.zh: 然后走一百步。左边，绿色招牌。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have it all in your head. No need for a box.
turns.zh: 你都记住了。不需要手机。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope I do not get mixed up. The streets all look the same.
turns.zh: 希望我不会搞混。这些街道看起来都一样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not be troubled. The bakery has a red front. Hard to miss.
turns.zh: 别担心。面包店门面是红色的。很难错过。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, red front. That is a good sign. I will look for that.
turns.zh: 哦，红色门面。那是个好标志。我会找那个。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. And after the turn, the green sign will be clear.
turns.zh: 是的。转弯后，绿色招牌就会很显眼。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I am off now. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 好的。我现在出发了。谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go on. You will be at the cafe in no time.
turns.zh: 去吧。你很快就到饮品店了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am walking now. Two streets, then right.
turns.zh: 我现在走了。两条街，然后右转。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. Keep your eyes on the red front.
turns.zh: 就是那条路。眼睛盯着红色门面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a red front. Is that the bakery?
turns.zh: 我看到一个红色门面。那是面包店吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is it. Turn right there.
turns.zh: 对，就是它。在那儿右转。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am at the turn now. The street is quiet.
turns.zh: 我现在在转弯处。这条街很安静。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now look for the green sign on the left.
turns.zh: 好。现在找左边的绿色招牌。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a green sign! It is about a hundred steps away.
turns.zh: 我看到一个绿色招牌！大约一百步远。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the place. You are almost there.
turns.zh: 就是那个地方。你马上就到了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am at the door now. The sign says 'Afternoon'.
turns.zh: 我现在在门口了。招牌上写着‘午后’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well done. You got it without a box.
turns.zh: 干得好。你没用手机就找到了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will go in now. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 我现在进去了。谢谢你的帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble at all. Have a good time.
turns.zh: 不麻烦。祝你开心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The drink smells good from here.
turns.zh: 这里就能闻到饮品的香气了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They make a good cup. I go there now and then.
turns.zh: 他们家的咖啡不错。我偶尔去那儿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have their special today.
turns.zh: 我今天试试他们的特调。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The one with milk and a bit of sweet? That is mine.
turns.zh: 加牛奶和一点甜的那种？那是我的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep that in mind. Thanks again.
turns.zh: 我记住了。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all right. Have a good drink.
turns.zh: 不客气。好好喝吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. sure for now.
turns.zh: 我会的。先告辞了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. be safe.
turns.zh: 好的。安全第一。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will start walking now.
turns.zh: 我这就动身了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a safe walk. It is a nice day.
turns.zh: 路上小心。今天天气不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The sun is bright, I do not mind the walk.
turns.zh: 阳光很好，我不介意走一走。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, and the street is quiet today.
turns.zh: 是的，而且今天街上挺安静的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see the red front of the bakery now.
turns.zh: 我现在看到面包店的红色门面了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is it! Turn right there.
turns.zh: 就是那里！在那儿右转。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am turning now. I see the green sign.
turns.zh: 我这转弯了。我看到绿色招牌了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Perfect. You will find the door easily.
turns.zh: 很好。你会很容易找到门口的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am at the door now. The sign says Afternoon.
turns.zh: 我现在到门口了。招牌写着“午后”。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Enjoy your drink inside.
turns.zh: 太好了。去里面喝点饮料吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Thank you for your kind help.
turns.zh: 我会的。谢谢您热心的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Have a wonderful day.
turns.zh: 不客气。祝你今天过得愉快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will go inside now.
turns.zh: 我现在进去了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sure. It is warm inside.
turns.zh: 好。里面挺暖和的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The door is open.
turns.zh: 门开着呢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The server is waiting.
turns.zh: 服务员在等着了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a clean table near the window.
turns.zh: 我看到窗户旁有一张干净的桌子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good spot.
turns.zh: 那是张好桌子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will sit there.
turns.zh: 我就坐那儿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Enjoy the tea.
turns.zh: 好好喝杯茶。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The place has a nice feeling.
turns.zh: 这地方感觉真好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is very popular.
turns.zh: 是的，这儿挺受欢迎的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see my friend now.
turns.zh: 我现在看到我朋友了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, good. Have fun.
turns.zh: 哦，太好了。祝你们玩得开心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is waving at me.
turns.zh: 他正在向我招手。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go say hello.
turns.zh: 快去打个招呼吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Thanks again for your time.
turns.zh: 我会的。再次感谢您的时间。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. You will see it.
turns.zh: 就是那样。你会看到的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will go now. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 好的。我现在就走。谢谢你的帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is all right. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 没问题。祝你今天愉快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, you too. okay.
turns.zh: 你也是。回头见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. Go straight, then right.
turns.zh: 好的。直走，然后右转。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have it in my head now.
turns.zh: 是的，我现在记住了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Off you go.
turns.zh: 好。去吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am at the red door. Is this the place?
turns.zh: 我到红色门了。是这里吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is it. The place for drink is inside.
turns.zh: 对，就是这里。喝东西的地方在里面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great! I made it. Thanks again.
turns.zh: 太好了！我到了。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Go in and have a good rest.
turns.zh: 不客气。进去好好休息一下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. The drink will be good after that walk.
turns.zh: 我会的。走了这么久，那杯饮料一定很香。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have your drink. Goodbye for now.
turns.zh: 喝你的饮品吧。再见。

storyBlurb: 手机没电，街角迷路。路人一指，转角遇到咖啡馆。
storyScript:
【开场·迷路求助】下午三点的阳光斜斜洒在十字路口，甲站在街角，手里攥着没电的手机，眉头微蹙。他环顾四周，陌生的街景让心里有些发慌。约定的咖啡馆就在附近，可导航一黑，方向全乱了。他看见一位本地居民模样的乙正悠闲地走过，便快步迎上去，礼貌地欠身，语气里带着歉意：您好，请问这附近有家叫‘午后’的咖啡馆吗？我手机没电了，找不到路。

【进行·指路说明】乙停下脚步，微微一笑，抬手朝东边指了指。他说话不紧不慢，声音温和：你往前走两个路口，看到一家面包店右转，再走一百米左右，左手边就是。那家店门口有个绿色的招牌，很好认。甲顺着乙的手指望去，目光落在远处的楼宇间，心里默默记下路线。乙又补了一句：大概走五分钟就到了。

【进行·确认理解】甲点点头，重复了一遍：两个路口右转，面包店那里，再走一百米，左手边绿色招牌。乙点头肯定，又补充道：对，没错。要是走到药店就过头了。甲心里踏实了些，再次道谢，脸上露出感激的笑容。乙摆摆手，转身继续自己的路。

【收束·找到地点】甲按照指引快步前行，穿过两个路口，果然看到面包店的橱窗。右转后数着步子，一百米左右，左手边那抹绿色招牌映入眼帘。咖啡馆的门半掩着，暖黄的灯光透出来。他推门而入，熟悉的咖啡香扑面而来。手机没电的焦虑一扫而空，只剩找到目的地的安心与对那位路人的感谢。
